mappings.note: Maya at desk with laptop; blue palette; reader enters state 'curious'
Code flowing to server; blue palette; 5:00 PM energy; small 600x400 breather
Three users confirming on phones; green palette signals normalcy; small 600x400 breather
Bug-reveal climax; red palette; 1000x800 size signals emotional peak; bug-creature at click-fetch intersection
NEW v2 panel — transitional 'alone, frustrated' state; red palette lingering; empty chair for the Formalist
Two-shot introducing the Formalist; purple palette; constellation motif foreshadows the state machine
Maya writing TLA+; purple palette continues; TLA+ syntax + state diagram side by side; bug invisible
TLC Crystal Computer climax; green palette; 1000x800 size; green beam catches red bug-creature; StateInvariant label
Maya pointing at verified state diagram; bug trapped in 'FIXED IN MODEL' box; verdict: VERIFIED stamp
Wide panoramic; green palette; constellation stretched across 'night sky'; diverse users, no incidents
NEW v2 panel — terminal VERIFIED stamp rotated -8 degrees; repeating constellation meta-texture; 'The math of trust.'
Reader states 'engaged' or 'curious' dominate panels 1-3 (the false confidence phase)
Panel 4 transitions reader to 'alarmed' — the moment of recognition
Panel 5 holds the 'frustrated' state — NEW in v2 to give the failure a beat before rescue
Panels 6-7 hold 'hopeful' — methodology introduced and being applied
Panels 8-9 hold 'enlightened' — verification succeeds, fix lands
Panels 10-11 hold 'empowered' — terminal state, methodology internalized
Each SVG has explicit width/height attributes and palette hex codes; file existence on disk is the type check
panelIndex=3 → state='alarmed' → palette='red' (#ef4444)
panelIndex=5,6 → state='hopeful' → palette='purple' (#a855f7)
panelIndex=7,8,9 → state='enlightened' or 'empowered' → palette='green' (#22c55e)
Bug-reveal gets the larger viewport: the moment of recognition demands visual weight
TLC-finds-it gets the larger viewport: the verification climax is the comic's thesis statement
Small panels give the eye a rest — pacing rhythm between heavier moments
Faint constellation appears in background — first foreshadowing of the state machine
Constellation active with one red bug-node flashing — the model is now visible
Constellation stretches across the night sky — methodology at scale
Maya present in protagonist-close panels; absent in world-view panels 3, 4, 8, 10
